title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 348.515 - Recognition of benefit of providing assistance to certain family farm operations
text:
348.515.  Recognition of benefit of providing assistance to certain family farm operations. — In recognition of the role of animal agriculture in the economic well-being of this state and in recognition that opportunities to succeed in agriculture should not be limited by the economic means of persons engaged in agriculture, the general assembly of the state of Missouri declares that state assistance in the guarantee of loans made to enable independent livestock and poultry family farm operations to succeed in the operation will benefit the state of Missouri economically and socially and is a public purpose of great importance.
(L. 2008 S.B. 931)
